reviews.review_title: IM BEGGING YOU TO MAKE A PART 2
reviews.review_description:
Dear￼ creators: In my opinion, this was the best puzzle game I have played, AND ALWAYS WILL BE, it had EVERYTHING, ACTION, COMEDY￼, DRAMA, EMOTIONALLY GORGEOUS, no seriously this game almost made me cry￼, so now I ask, PLEASE MAKE A PART 2 
From, me: MrRoco

Super easy to easy puzzler.  Was expcecting more toilet humor since the main character is a toilet.  Trover humor needed.   How about you make a nice sign ''TOILET humor here''.   Something simple funny like a Virtual drumkit with Toilet sound.
Not too difficult, just enough to make your brain move, and the humor isn't offensive just silly and funny. You'd have to be pretty joyless to not at least smile at this game
Funny puzzler. Mostly pretty easy, but still some interesting mechanics like invisible objects.

It was fun but more story would be nice

Sorry I don't know how to write a review

This game goes all out on humor that would appeal to an 8 year old (in the worst possible sense), yet it has a rating for 13 year olds, because some of its flat jokes are not good for kids. The jokes seem to be written by a child, they are unfunny and bland. I am really confused about what’s the target audience here. The puzzles are mind-numbingly easy, most of them I solved in a matter of 5 seconds, unless I had to struggle with controls a bit.

Don’t buy this if you’re an adult, and don’t buy this for your kids. Looks like no matter what, you should not buy it.

For the first hour or so I was having a pretty good time with this, maybe a bit easy, but fun enough.  Then for some reason, I believe a patch was released, and it simply doesn't work.

Even after deleting saves, app data and reinstalling, I'm just presented with a broken white screen with a red arrow on pressing play on the main menu. 

I'll rewrite this if the Devs ever fix it, but for now it's a big avoid.

developer_response.body:
Uh-oh. I've emergency-reverted the live build to v1.0.9-- PLEASE let me know if it's still broken. And I will be interrogating the party responsible for uploading a broken build live (aka me)!! My SINCEREST apologies for giving you such a far-from-five-star experience, and I do hope you can forgive me!

If I remain cancelled for my sins, I humbly accept my fate. I at least hope you are able to continue enjoying Snapstick. The snaps must be sticked! 🫰🏒

reviews.review_description:
I really did enjoy every moment i got to play this game (minus a few times when a scene would not start after completing a puzzle and only working after restarting), game has been a lot of fun.
But i havent completed it because my safe file is broken... after loading it i am thrown in a glitched scene with no way out forcing me to quit the game...
I really want to finnish this game and know what will happen to the dog!! But i wont start a new campaign risking losing it as well...
If the game gets patched, i'll come back and give it 5 stars.

developer_response.body:
It's me! It's my fault! I ruined Christmas for everyone by pushing a broken build. (This is the closest to being a villain as I've ever felt in my life.)

I've emergency hot-swapped out to v1.0.9, which should be smooth sailing. I hope you can forgive me some day in the future and that we can break bread together again.

I treasure you.

-Brett

reviews.review_description: Sat and played it over a couple of evenings until I'd completed it. I love puzzle games and if it's decent puzzles and comedy, it's probably going to be a win for me.  Enjoyed that it's a combo of dark and silly humour. My only disappointment is that it ended. Please make more!

reviews.review_title: Great game, but bug in v1.1.5
reviews.review_description:
Hey there, great game but it now gets stuck after building the flat earth in the solar system bit at 41%. When I complete the flat earth, nothing appears to do to move on, the 4 planets just hover with a blank table. Tested on MQ3, v72 23/2/25

UPDATE 25/2/25: Fixed by devs with prompt update within 48hrs, continued through with same save no problems. Thanks!

The puzzles are very easy, I thought it'd be a nice game for my nieces, but turns out the story line with the dog is not children friendly.. And honestly i don't like it at all for myself either. I'm not the kind of person who laugh at thugs going wrong, people getting hurt and that kind of thing. The toilet is also very annoying. Just very said I bought it as part of a bundle and now I cannot return cuz I played too much the other game

developer_response.body: Shucks, sorry to hear. Snapstick is rated 13+ because of the dog storyline, which is intended as a very silly tragedy (sounds like it wasn't your cup of tea though). I too prefer happy endings, so all the other characters in Snapstick get heartfelt resolutions. (Not sure if this will brighten your sub-optimal experience, but I at least wanted to let you know!)

reviews.review_description: The puzzles are fun. Some easy, some challenging, none of them made me have to watch a walkthrough on youtube to solve them. The storylines are hilarious and super cute. I found myself really into the dog story. And the toilet reminds me of my cousin Nick. If you knew Nick, you'd think so, too. But you don't.

reviews.review_title: Good puzzles but lack of support
reviews.review_description: Developers given up on this game doesn't last long extra puzzles strain it out

developer_response.body: Hey, Rednirt91! What kind of support do you need? I'm here for you!

reviews.review_description: The moment a little dog shows up, strap yourself in. Intended to play ten minutes, played about an hour. I laughed so hard I couldn’t progress to the next puzzle in several instances. What an absolute home run of a game. It’s so silly and wonderful. Stellar voice acting and a script that is right on the money. Brett Taylor, you sir made this 40 year old laugh so uncontrollably hard. Sometimes, the scene isn’t immediately apparent, but when you pick up on what’s going on… I laughed so hard I cried in one spot. A+++ three pluses, one for the A, two to keep in your back pockets, Brett (and team!). Thank you so much. Cannot wait to finish it.

"What Snapstick lacks in difficulty, it more than makes up for with its glorious charm. There’s a nice mix of puzzles to keep you busy between all the stupid story elements, and they’re pretty engaging – even if they don’t offer anything especially unique. Still, if you’re after a game that will keep a smile on your face throughout then this is a perfect choice."

Read the full review over at The Elite Institute (dot) net!

This game is bursting with imagination! It’s like ten games in one! It’s like flipping thru TV channels of a dozen comfy puzzles! 

The joy and passion of the makers of this game really shine thru in every detail! From the outrageous menu music, to the variation of sounds and voices, to my incredibly rendered lipstick! 

If you’re in for a light comedy jog thru Happy Solving Land, this is the one!

reviews.review_title: Came for the puzzles, stayed for the 🦖
reviews.review_description:
Absolutely delightfully weird gem of a game, so much joy and delight has been sprinkled into it.
Legit can’t believe how MUCH content there is.. most of it incredibly silly and hilarious! 

Already one of the all time great VR experiences

This game is amazing, so much fun and extremely funny. I won’t say anymore, just buy this game, you will really enjoy it if you’re into puzzles, and humor. I hope there is a continuation coming soon, i can’t get enough!!

I never write reviews, but I want to add to all the 5-star love. This is by far the best game of the 30+ I've purchased over the years. The mechanics are brilliant and the puzzles are creative and amusing. Congrats to the developers! More, please.

This is a very simple and chill puzzle game. I like the variety of puzzles I've seen so far, and just the very laid back nature of the title. The humor being great when it comes up is icing on the cake.
One thing that kind of adds to the very laid back feel of the game outside of aesthetics and music, both of which are great as well, is the general puzzle difficulty.
I'm only around maybe 15-20% at most in to the game I think, but 99% of the puzzles thus far I've figured out and completed within the first 1st glance and 2-3 seconds to actually set everything in motion. So it's very much child friendly all around, but even as an adult I just get joy out of spending 10-15 minutes just completing all of these simple micro-puzzles. Especially with the humor and general light/ joyful atmosphere attached to it all. 
So I'm very glad to have come across this little gem, and I highly recommend everyone who loves puzzle games (and won't mind never really being at all challanged) and would just like a quirky laid back casual puzzler to buy this game immediately!
It's definitely a great one.

reviews.review_title: Snapstick is such a fun comedic game!
reviews.review_description:
I'm addicted to Snapstick, it's such a fun puzzle game that came out on October 3rd and is compatible with all supported Meta Quest, including the 3S!

You're offered over 500 puzzles and the nice thing is that there's variety where you are always introduced to new types of puzzles before it gets too boring. 

Another entertaining aspect is that there are stories that you follow along the game. You find things such as a loser toilet trying to find a friend, the story of a dog cheating on his wife, a crime couple having a bad relationship, and many more very funny moments that keeps it entertaining. 

And the game contains songs made by Grant Kirkhope! Composer of games such as Banjo Kazooie and Goldeneye on Nintendo 64.

The mixed reality is very well done as I could see around my house and it detected my walls and furniture very well. 

I recommend it if you enjoy fun little puzzles with some comedy. Snapstick took me a little less than 3 and a half hour to complete, but there are additional puzzles to do after finishing it.

This game is jam packed with puzzles, but also successful mixes humor with heart. Comedy games that are actually funny are hard to come by, and Snapstick keeps you guessing while having a boatload of content. The mixture of pass through and hand controls make it really customizable.

Whoever wrote these jokes is a genius. I’ll never look at a toilet the same way again 🚽🖤

I picked this one up due to the high rating on the store, even without knowing much about the game. But as soon as I met the talking toilet and the dog with marital problems, I knew I had made the right decision. Absolute cracker of a game 👍

things to know if you are deciding to buy this:

1)  you must actually really enjoy doing puzzles 

2) The puzzles are not too difficult they are the "correct amount of difficulty" nothing too crazy that will keep you hours on a puzzle 

3) the story lines mixed with some of the puzzles are really well done! loved that part however not every puzzle has it.  sometimes you are only be presented the puzzle alone for awhile and that is why you must be okay with my number 1 point here or you will probably not really enjoy

I loved this game it was great I binged the whole thing absolutely enjoyed it

🐶🍻

Beat the main story last night and absolutely loved it. The talking toilet is hilarious. I was pleasantly surprised after the credits to see so many more levels to complete after the main story also!! One of my favorite VR puzzles games!!!

reviews.review_title: Creative and funny VR puzzle game
reviews.review_description:
Snap Stick is a gem in the VR puzzle game world, blending challenge, creativity, humor and heart. 

It's a double-threat with a wide variety of imaginative yet well-balanced puzzles and also an infectious sense of humor - expect to chuckle as you scratch your virtual head over increasingly clever conundrums.

Whether you're a puzzle enthusiast or just seeking a fun VR experience, Snap Stick delivers. It's a must-play for anyone with a VR headset and a love for clever, humorous brain-teasers.
Great concept and funny dialogue. Only thing missing is Quest Achievements!
Id give it a try

developer_response.body: I just gave it a try. Can confirm. It is pretty good

reviews.review_title: I didn't know a game could be so...
reviews.review_description:
Well, personal.

It feels like a conversation with the developer.

developer_response.body: Thanks! Yeah, that's the goal. How's your day been going, btw?

reviews.review_title: Puzzling Places but its a comedy game…
reviews.review_description:
…and a really heartfelt one at that! 

I played the first hour and can’t wait to get back in. The sheer variety of puzzles and the way the game delivers both (literal) punchlines and story bits is really well done. Can highly recommend fans of puzzle, story or comedy games (or all of the above) to try this out!
I wasn't expecting this game to be this much fun! It's a great game Devs!!! 🐕🐶🦕♥️💔 😂

I love Snapstick! It's a rambunctious puzzle game with tons of distinct comedic gags that legitimately made me chuckle or even laugh out loud, including poking fun at puzzle games and VR. And jokes and stories that intertwine perfectly with the gameplay (the agent missions, the dog saga, the barista!). There are lots of puzzle mechanic types the game switches between - the shadow casting mechanics in particular are some of my favorites, they bent my brain. The individual puzzle levels are ALL handcrafted and unique from each other, there are no filler levels. This game is BIG and polished. And it has a big wholesome streak with the humor and vibes (while also not being pandering). I am big into puzzle games, so I am biased, but I highly recommend Snapstick!
The puzzles are great, starting of easy but getting more complicated quickly. What makes this game stand out is the absurd humour. This game is one of those rare VR surprises.

reviews.review_title: Don’t Flush This One Down The Toilet
reviews.review_description:
FIRST REVIEW!

If you love comedy, if you love puzzles, this is the game for you. Snapstick contains multiple mini stories within the game that’ll keep you physically laughing with the occasional “aweeeee.” The toilet is looking for a friend. Will you impress him? 

There are a variety of puzzles, over 500, that start off simple but progress in difficulty throughout the game, created by a multi-award-winning puzzle designer. At first, it may seem too simple. Just wait for it. But nothing is too challenging where just a few active brain cells are required to solve them. Some of the puzzles are “shady,” and some are “ruff.” There are occasional surprises throughout the game and those are the best moments. Although entertaining, the puzzles are just a distraction from the highlights of the game- the absurd jokes and gags. 

You can play in passthrough or full virtual reality (full immersion is the best) and with hand tracking. This game is brilliant. The most HILARIOUS puzzle game!!

I participated in the beta testing process and have no regrets. This is a day one purchase! Check out the toilet’s story on my YT channel. @misschiefvr
This game took me by surprise. Hilarious, bizarre (in a good way!), and genuinely fun, I've never played a puzzle game quite like this. Highly recommended to go in blind and enjoy the ride.

reviews.review_title: Super fun relaxing and witty game
reviews.review_description:
What a fun game to play, from the comfort of my couch going through various puzzles that are not excruciating to solve yet are challenging just enough to keep you sharp. 

For me the best part of the game is the characters' wittiness and humour. It feels like you are playing with a buddy. 

There is a sense of irony that is creating such a fun layer to the game.

There is joy, there is sadness its a story telling roller coaster and all of that while you are calmly solving an abundance of puzzles 

Try it out and you wont regret it :)

I’m enjoying playing this puzzler more than any other.. Laughs and brain ticklers are a good combo. Just 25-30 puzzles in and smiling at both the humour and the satisfaction at solving each level. A great addition to my game collection.  Great job devs!

reviews.review_title: This Years suprise must play VR title!!
reviews.review_description:
Snap Stick......Snap Stick......dun dun dun......Snap Stick, Snap Stick.

Looking for a fun light-hearted puzzler that constantly mixes things up?
Look no further than Snap Stick!

The game is perfectly paced as you go through the game puzzles, gradually getting more difficult as you progress (never to the point of "tear your hair out difficult" XD)

But it's fine though as the game constantly chops and changes the puzzle types to keep it fresh throughout.
I would talk through some of the puzzle types......... but it's 100% better going in blind.

There is also a narrative going throughout the game which will make you both laugh and cry!
It's very rare for a game to make me genuinely laugh out as much as Snap Stick did.

With music composed by the legendary Grant Kirkhope and top-notch funny humor/dialog.......it will certainly have you bopping away and smiling throughout.

I've yet to try out the Hand tracking/Pass-through mode but I'm sure to do this in the future.

Genuinely one of the biggest surprise VR games of this year.
One for fans of puzzles and humor (even if you don't think you like puzzle games....Snap Stick will sure get you to change your mind!)

I can't wait to see what the team has planned for the future (in terms of DLC and Expansions)

reviews.review_title: So very invested in this game.
reviews.review_description:
I have only progressed 26% through the game so far, but my word am I invested in this games story. Such beautiful simplistic puzzle gameplay, however the creator has found a way to pack so much of an emotional roller coaster of a story into it's simplicity, and I'm gripped. I can't wait to see where it will take me.
An easy 5 stars, and I foresee this becoming an instant classic.
